bug_report.summary: New Entry dialog default size/layout changed significantly (much narrower; leaves large unused area)
steps_to_reproduce: Go to Library → Add entry using… (opens the “New Entry” dialog).
expected_behaviors: The “New Entry” dialog should open with the same default size/geometry as before (no major, unexpected shrink that leaves large unused space).
actual_behaviors: After the change, the “New Entry” dialog opens substantially narrower than before, leaving a large blank area of the main window visible on the right; recommended-type buttons reflow (e.g., “Misc” shifts position) due to the reduced width.

bug_report.summary: New Entry dialog: Recommended types layout broken (blank type button; 'Misc' appears displaced/duplicated)
steps_to_reproduce: Open the “New Entry” dialog (e.g., Add entry).
expected_behaviors: Each recommended entry type is shown as a single labeled button (e.g., Article, Book, InProceedings, TechReport, Misc).
actual_behaviors: The “Recommended types” area shows a small blank/unnamed button on the right, while “Misc” appears in an unexpected position (stacked under/near “Article”), suggesting the type buttons are mis-laid out or duplicated.

bug_report.summary: Clean up entries dialog column header is truncated at 20pt font ("Field na…")
steps_to_reproduce: Enable overriding the application font size and set it to 20 pt; apply changes.
Create/open any library and select an entry.
expected_behaviors: Dialog layout scales so labels/headers are readable (e.g., column header shows full "Field name"), without truncation at the default dialog size.
actual_behaviors: The left column header is truncated and displayed as "Field na…" in the opened dialog.
